{{Infobox technique
| name = Forger techniques
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Forger techniques]] can carry users where they need to go.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] sent [[Lindon]] a dark blue gem-[[construct]] containing information on [[Forger techniques]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] had previously absorbed [[Forger techniques]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Forger techniques]] are strung across the halls like webs by [[Subject One]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
